concepts.title: 🌪️ Lorenz Attractor
concepts.name: Lorenz Attractor
concepts.what_it_is: A chaotic system producing butterfly-shaped loops—trajectories never repeat but stay within a bounded shape. Classic symbol of deterministic chaos.
how_to_use: looping light trails follow Lorenz attractor paths around her body
aura of butterfly-wing energy orbitals in chaotic symmetry
hair floats in Lorenz-spiraled arcs of soft blue plasma
concepts.animation_behavior: Smooth but unstable loops, orbiting trails, sensitive to touch or emotional states—never quite repeating. ---

concepts.title: 🧬 Julia Sets
concepts.name: Julia Sets
concepts.what_it_is: Fractal shapes formed by iterating complex functions. Can look like coral, veins, or alien terrain depending on parameters. More shape-like than the Mandelbrot set.
how_to_use: her skin is lined with glowing Julia-set veins—like coral etched in light
the environment forms from Julia fractals, branching infinitely
a halo of floating fractal shards in soft iridescent loops
concepts.animation_behavior: Zooming pulses, expanding from points, recursive undulation ---

concepts.title: 🌀 Strange Attractors (General)
concepts.name: Strange Attractors (General)
concepts.what_it_is: Dynamic systems where trajectories settle into complex, never-repeating loops. Includes Lorenz, Rössler, Duffing, etc.
how_to_use: limbs traced with attractor logic—looping trails of light orbit the form
chaotic spiral fields trace emotional charge in ambient geometry
concepts.animation_behavior: Shifting loops that orbit or drift—no two turns the same, but always returning to the shape ---

concepts.title: 🌿 Iterated Function Systems (IFS)
concepts.name: Iterated Function Systems (IFS)
concepts.what_it_is: Fractals built from repeated geometric transformations. Famous for ferns, leaves, galaxies, and recursively branching forms.
how_to_use: wings patterned with recursive IFS symmetry—each feather a smaller echo of the whole
gown grown from IFS logic: organic spirals of translucent scale-leaves
concepts.animation_behavior: Continuous growth outward—branching, flowering, pulsing from a point of origin ---

concepts.title: 🔲 Mandelbrot Set
concepts.name: Mandelbrot Set
concepts.what_it_is: The iconic fractal “map” where Julia sets live—self-similar across infinite zoom, edge full of variety.
how_to_use: a shell of Mandelbrot crust encases her like sacred chaotic armor
terrain folds outward in Mandelbrot valleys and fractal spires
concepts.animation_behavior: Endless zoom, recursive edge morphing, rotating fractal fields ---

concepts.title: 🌊 Bifurcation Diagrams
concepts.name: Bifurcation Diagrams
concepts.what_it_is: Visual maps showing where systems split into multiple outcomes—like a branching fork of possibilities as parameters change.
how_to_use: wings unfold like a bifurcation diagram—each choice fracturing into new lightpaths
her aura is a branching splitfield of potential, a living bifurcation bloom
concepts.animation_behavior: Branching outward, flickering between future paths, unstable balance around each fork ---

concepts.title: 🔁 Feedback Loops (Nonlinear Systems)
concepts.name: Feedback Loops (Nonlinear Systems)
concepts.what_it_is: Systems where the output loops back into the input—amplifying, mutating, or stabilizing behaviors. Chaos emerges when feedback gets wild.
how_to_use: her voice triggers feedback visuals: sound pulses build into geometric bloom
cloak that evolves via nonlinear feedback—folds deepen as motion repeats
concepts.animation_behavior: Reacts to motion or sound, visuals build over time, unstable feedback pulses ---

concepts.title: 🧩 Fractal Dimension (Hausdorff Dimension)
concepts.name: Fractal Dimension (Hausdorff Dimension)
concepts.what_it_is: A way to describe shapes that aren’t whole-dimensional—like a curve that almost fills a surface. Used to describe coastlines, clouds, blood vessels, etc.
how_to_use: her skin has a fractional dimensional crust—neither flat nor textured, but infinitely in-between
a gown woven from fractional light—drifting between 1D thread and 2D mist
concepts.animation_behavior: Flickering at different levels of zoom, texture appears and vanishes depending on perspective ---

concepts.title: 📈 Lyapunov Exponent (Chaos Sensitivity)
concepts.name: Lyapunov Exponent (Chaos Sensitivity)
concepts.what_it_is: Measures how sensitive a system is to initial conditions—the famous “butterfly effect.” High Lyapunov = chaotic, low = stable.
how_to_use: the shimmer of her body reflects high Lyapunov variance—colors shift at the smallest input
space around her flickers with sensitivity—a chaos field tuned to emotion
concepts.animation_behavior: Subtle reactions to slight motion, micro-changes ripple outward in light ---

concepts.title: ⌛ Time Series & Phase Space Maps
concepts.name: ⌛ Time Series & Phase Space Maps
concepts.what_it_is: Time series show system behavior over time. Phase space maps track all possible states of a system. Together, they’re motion maps of reality.
how_to_use: her body a living time series—each gesture trails motion echoes across phase space
space folds into phase-mapped layers, every direction a memory of movement
concepts.animation_behavior: Fading trails, ghost limbs, recursive path echoes, memory-motion unfolding in real time

concepts.title: 🔳 Henon Map
concepts.name: Henon Map
concepts.what_it_is: A discrete chaotic system that generates 2D point patterns—like a scattered, elliptical vortex. Classic for strange attractor shapes.
how_to_use: energy field generated by Henon map logic—points swirl into chaotic ellipse
wings stitched from Henon chaos points—each feather a spatial trajectory
concepts.animation_behavior: Points orbit elliptically, cluster and scatter, seemingly random but bounded ---

concepts.title: 🔥 Fractal Flames (Scott Draves)
concepts.name: Fractal Flames (Scott Draves)
concepts.what_it_is: A method to render fractals with colored, layered translucency and glowing trails. Combines nonlinear functions + color gradients.
how_to_use: her body is made of fractal flame light—layered wisps of color moving like slow fire
the background pulses in shifting flame fractals—iridescent trails dancing in chaos
concepts.animation_behavior: Smoothly shifting trails, layered glowing pulses, color morph over time ---

concepts.title: 🕳️ Escape-Time Algorithms
concepts.name: Escape-Time Algorithms
concepts.what_it_is: Used to render fractals like the Mandelbrot set—each pixel's color is based on how fast it “escapes” to infinity during iteration.
how_to_use: terrain built from escape-time logic—colors bloom based on divergence
her dress glows brighter where values escape fast—like chaotic tide maps
concepts.animation_behavior: Color flickers based on input or location, zoom reveals layers of escape patterns ---

concepts.title: 🔻 Self-Affine Fractals
concepts.name: Self-Affine Fractals
concepts.what_it_is: Fractals with different scaling in different directions—stretched or warped symmetry. Common in nature (e.g., mountain ranges).
how_to_use: the landscape is a self-affine stretch—each ridge scaled nonuniformly in fractal logic
her limbs are elongated like self-affine branches—chaotic but balanced
concepts.animation_behavior: Scaling shifts along different axes, pulsing distortion over form ---

concepts.title: 💥 Attractor Merging & Collapse
concepts.name: Attractor Merging & Collapse
concepts.what_it_is: When two or more attractors interact—can merge into a new shape or collapse into a chaotic crash. Represents system destabilization.
how_to_use: two chaotic entities merge—attractor fields collapsing into a single luminous form
her aura flickers through attractor collapse—moments of harmony shatter into noise
concepts.animation_behavior: Attractors orbit, destabilize, snap into one form or explode into chaos

concepts.title: 🟣 Cantor Dust & Cantor Sets
concepts.name: 🟣 Cantor Dust & Cantor Sets
concepts.what_it_is: Infinitely fragmented structures made by removing middle portions—like a visual representation of infinite emptiness. Appears as scattered dust with no solid core.
how_to_use: her cloak is woven from Cantor dust—shimmering particles suspended in ordered void
the space dissolves into Cantor fractals—fragmented light and shadow in recursive intervals
concepts.animation_behavior: Particles blink in and out, recursive disintegration, flickering digital silence ---

concepts.title: 🌿 L-Systems (Lindenmayer Systems)
concepts.name: L-Systems (Lindenmayer Systems)
concepts.what_it_is: Recursive string-replacement systems that model natural growth—used to simulate plants, fungi, lightning, and coral.
how_to_use: horns that grow like L-systems—symmetrical, recursive branching from crown to tip
forest of fungal light—every stalk a recursive L-system bloom
concepts.animation_behavior: Smooth growing recursion, curling growths, stepwise expansion over time ---

concepts.title: 🔮 Newton Fractals
concepts.name: Newton Fractals
concepts.what_it_is: Fractals created from Newton’s method for finding roots—results in ghostly, web-like basins of attraction.
how_to_use: her skin reflects Newton fractals—zones of iridescent logic where light chooses a path
the space blooms in Newton basins—shifting boundary webs of convergence
concepts.animation_behavior: Fractal surfaces change color based on user position or energy state ---

concepts.title: 🧠 Symbolic Bifurcation
concepts.name: Symbolic Bifurcation
concepts.what_it_is: Bifurcation as metaphor: a single path splitting into symbolically charged trajectories—used in chaos theory and metaphysics alike.
how_to_use: a sigil of bifurcation unfolds in light—each path represents a soul trajectory
her crown fractalizes into bifurcated glyphs—forked symbols of choice and fate
concepts.animation_behavior: Unfolding logic trees, glowing rune-branches, binary forked pulses ---

concepts.title: 🧾 Recursive Topology (Meta-Containment)
concepts.name: Recursive Topology (Meta-Containment)
concepts.what_it_is: Structures that contain versions of themselves—used to create worlds inside worlds. “A map where every room contains the map.”
how_to_use: her geometry loops recursively—each layer holds a smaller self repeating inward
temple walls tessellate into recursive topology—each pattern zooms into its own micro-world
concepts.animation_behavior: Zoom reveals hidden layers, recursion folds in and out of itself, endless inner space

concepts.title: 🧫 Cellular Automata (Conway, Wolfram)
concepts.name: Cellular Automata (Conway, Wolfram)
concepts.what_it_is: Rule-based grids where each cell changes over time depending on its neighbors. Can model life, death, motion, and chaos from simple rules.
how_to_use: her skin pulses with cellular automata—each patch evolving through birth and decay
floor tiles react like Game of Life—emitting light when motion passes near
concepts.animation_behavior: Cell states flicker, patterns ripple outward, responsive to interaction or internal states ---

concepts.title: 🧬 Turing Patterns
concepts.name: Turing Patterns
concepts.what_it_is: Natural patterns that form through chemical reactions and diffusion—responsible for zebra stripes, leopard spots, and coral forms.
how_to_use: her skin is covered in Turing stripes—organic symmetry, mathematical in origin
the creature’s shell is etched with Turing pulses—spots that shift with breath
concepts.animation_behavior: Patterns slowly ripple or morph across the surface—living paint ---

concepts.title: 🧿 Hyperbolic Tiling
concepts.name: Hyperbolic Tiling
concepts.what_it_is: Tiling that happens in curved space—like Escher’s famous fish patterns that shrink infinitely toward the edges.
how_to_use: her cloak ripples with hyperbolic tiling—endless recursive figures shrinking into curvature
temple floors bend in hyperbolic symmetry—non-Euclidean mosaics wrapping inwards
concepts.animation_behavior: Tiling flows inward forever, curvature increases, perspective warps as you move ---

concepts.title: 🌀 Quasiperiodic Structures (Penrose Tiling)
concepts.name: Quasiperiodic Structures (Penrose Tiling)
concepts.what_it_is: Patterns that never repeat but still follow strict logic. Often used in quasicrystals and sacred geometry. Penrose tiling is the most famous.
how_to_use: her armor is grown from Penrose tiling—geometric truth in chaotic logic
the floor is quasiperiodic—no tile repeats, yet all fits together in symmetry
concepts.animation_behavior: New tiles appear without repetition, structures unfold in aperiodic bloom ---

concepts.title: 🌡️ Reaction-Diffusion Systems
concepts.name: Reaction-Diffusion Systems
concepts.what_it_is: Math systems modeling how two substances interact—often creates flowing, rippling blobs like pigment spreading in water.
how_to_use: her aura is made of reaction-diffusion—fluid color pulses spreading across her form
the wall bleeds with math—reaction waves ripple like alien bio-ink
concepts.animation_behavior: Color flows in waves, reactive ripple effects, pulsing with life or thought
